meaning: 哥里[苏联格鲁吉亚中部城市](斯大林故乡)
examples: Policemen are helping the wounded soldier in Gori.
They formed a human chain in Gori and marched towards Karaleti.
Then, without any explanation, word suddenly spread that the Georgian army was retreating from Gori.
"We received assurances that Tbilisi will not be attacked, but the same thing was said about the town of Gori, " Lomsadze said.
